data.body:
EXPERIMENTAL RESULTS (round 4) — decomposition review + DSO full-suite + overlay triggering + signal-loss study

Ran the full review suite on this epic + its 9 children, on a varied 12-ticket DSO sample, validated overlay
triggering, and compared our finding volume to DSO's fidelity review. ~110 LLM runs. Full writeup:
docs/experiments/plan-review-decomposition-overlays-retune.md; raw data under docs/experiments/data/ (r4_*.jsonl).

A) EPIC + CHILDREN: the epic is clean (4 minor findings; G5 decomposition RESOLVED now it has children). But the
   9 child STORIES drew 7-10 mostly-MAJOR findings each — the gate applied full LEAF-implementation scrutiny (E6
   proving-commands, leaf overlays) to mid-level stories that defer that detail to their tasks. -> the round's
   central tuning signal.

B) DSO SAMPLE (12: epics incl. one without brainstorm:complete, stories, tasks, bugs): the new EXP criterion
   behaves correctly (suppressed on the bc47 pilot epic + all mechanical work; fired only on 1414's underived
   batch=20 threshold). Bugs drew 6-7 planning-findings each -> empirically confirms the design's bug-exemption.
   E5/E6/F4/overlays over-fire on mechanical/test tasks (TYPE mismatch).

C) OVERLAY TRIGGERING validated: T1/T5a/T5d fire from low-FP DETERMINISTIC signals (bright-lines/UI-keyword,
   12-13/13 agreement, ~0 FP); T8/T6/T5b/T5c/T9 must be LLM-ROUTED (T8 keyword-matches 9/13 but only 3 relevant ->
   high FP). Encoded per-overlay in the registry trigger field.

D) SIGNAL-LOSS (why we are leaner than DSO): NOT losing signal. On b575 DSO recorded 12 findings, our single-turn
   7 — but our T8 agentic structural-gap probe RECOVERED 5 of DSO's 6 bot-psychologist gaps (same enum-vocabulary-
   mismatch class). DSO's extra volume on e7f3 (8 vs ours) was forced per-dimension scoring (3->5 revisions) our
   anti-FP coaching posture correctly drops. The only signal-loss risk was UNDER-TRIGGERING T8 — fixed by the
   overlay router firing T8 on LLM/agent-design plans. Our leanness = less noise, same signal.

RE-TUNE (implemented + re-run): proportionate scrutiny by LEVEL (epic/story/task) + TYPE (bug-exempt; E5-suppress
on test tasks; F4 N/A on internal leaf), via an `applies_at` criterion field. Re-run validation: children dropped
7-10 -> 3-8 findings, concentrated on the REAL ones (E2 ambiguities, E5 testing-strategy, G5 decompose-into-tasks,
EXP unvalidated claims, T5e arch); leaf-noise gone. Criteria content is well-calibrated; the fix is ROUTING + the
one new EXP criterion. Epic design + the overlays/layer2 child stories updated accordingly.
